belier.author: Sibylle
belier.intro: Aries, this first day of May lands you on the threshold between spring's last breath and summer's first warmth, where your natural fire meets the patient depth of Taurus season. Mars still urges you to charge forward, but the Sun in Taurus quietly suggests you place your feet on solid ground. You can root your momentum in one tangible gesture today.
belier.love: If you are partnered, you have an opportunity to offer something sensual and simple, a small flower picked on a walk, an unexpected caress without words. If you are single, a frank encounter on an ordinary errand could catch your attention through its honesty rather than its flash. Let your silences speak.
belier.work: A project has been waiting for you to come back to the concrete, and the sky offers you the clarity to do exactly that. Refuse the parasitic small requests and concentrate on one meaningful step forward. Your natural authority gains finesse when you choose what truly deserves your fire.
belier.energy: Vitality is full, almost solar, and asks to be channeled rather than scattered. A short outdoor activity will absorb the surplus before it turns into restlessness or impatience.
belier.intuition: A quiet idea crosses your mind on waking and deserves to be noted, even in two words. It will return to find you later this week, more precise and more ripe.
belier.mantra: I root my momentum in the beauty of today.

taureau.author: Sibylle
taureau.intro: Taurus, this first of May is almost your cosmic birthday, the Sun bathes your sign in generous light. Venus complements you with a sensual softness that turns each detail into a gift. Settle into a garden, real or inner, and savor for a moment.
taureau.love: Love today moves through the senses and through slowness. If you are partnered, an unhurried meal can be enough to rekindle complicity. If you are single, a smile exchanged in a queue could carry more weight than you imagine.
taureau.work: You can return to an old file with fresh hands, as if your fingers remembered the right priorities. A financial request deserves to be stated clearly, without ornament. Your apparent calm hides a real, steady determination.
taureau.energy: Energy is round, sensual, deeply settled. A brief barefoot walk on grass or sand reconnects you with your center.
taureau.intuition: Your body recognizes what truly nourishes you before your mind does. Trust an unusual appetite or a desire that surfaces without warning, they have their own logic.
taureau.mantra: I savor the gentle richness of this moment.

gemeaux.author: Sibylle
gemeaux.intro: Gemini, your mind flutters with finesse on this festive Friday. Mercury stretches invisible threads between a morning conversation and an afternoon encounter. You can weave these clues into a coherent story if you take the time to write a few lines.
gemeaux.love: Words are your favorite playground, and today they unlock unexpected doors. If you are partnered, a curious question asked as on day one revives complicity. If you are single, an online conversation takes a more personal turn than expected.
gemeaux.work: You juggle several topics with ease, and that very agility is what is asked of you today. Note everything in a single notebook so nothing slips. An idea spoken aloud will find a favorable echo before lunch.
gemeaux.energy: Energy is nervous and slightly feverish, asking for steadier breath. Hydrate more than usual and grant yourself screen-free pauses every two hours.
gemeaux.intuition: A word crossed twice in the same day is no accident. Jot it down on a corner of paper, its meaning will reveal itself before Monday.
gemeaux.mantra: I weave ideas and open new paths.

cancer.author: Sibylle
cancer.intro: Cancer, the Moon whispers a tender melody to you on this first day of May. Your emotions are as fine as morning dew, to be gathered without pressure. Offer yourself a cocoon, even briefly, to let them speak softly.
cancer.love: You feel a quiet need for sincere attention. If you are partnered, voice it with tenderness rather than holding it as silent expectation. If you are single, an old friendship could reveal a romantic shade if you make yourself emotionally available.
cancer.work: Your relational intuition makes you precious in a team. You can defuse a tension with a few well-chosen words, without carrying everyone else's mood. Guard your own limits like a treasure.
cancer.energy: Sensitive energy moves in gentle waves. A warm infusion, a heavy blanket, a long bath: your body asks for enveloping warmth.
cancer.intuition: A recent dream holds a clue about a coming decision. Note it before it fades, even briefly, and the meaning will surface afterward.
cancer.mantra: I let myself feel and I let myself rest.

lion.author: Sibylle
lion.intro: Leo, on this warm first of May, your inner light is already preparing for summer's full radiance. You have an opportunity to inspire those around you through a presence that shines without overwhelming. You do not need to dazzle at any cost, your real generosity is enough.
lion.love: Your spontaneous gestures work wonders today. A sincere compliment, a symbolic attention, an unexpected message warms a heart. If you are single, your charisma draws a steady gaze that does not look away too quickly.
lion.work: You can take the floor in an exchange and leave a mark without overdoing it. Prepare two or three key sentences, delivered with calm assurance. Your authority broadens when you also know how to listen patiently.
lion.energy: Energy is high, joyful, almost solar. A creative activity at the end of the day will keep this fire from turning into frustration or irritability.
lion.intuition: Your heart already knows what your mind hesitates to acknowledge. Ask yourself a simple question tonight: what would make me proud of myself before sleep?
lion.mantra: I shine with generosity and clarity.

vierge.author: Sibylle
vierge.intro: Virgo, the sky offers you a precious clarity to separate the essential from the superfluous. The Sun in Taurus reinforces your love for the concrete, without rigidity. You can set your perfectionism aside for a moment and savor what is already well built.
vierge.love: Small gestures speak loudly today. If you are partnered, a service rendered without being asked deepens trust significantly. If you are single, a serious conversation with a stranger could awaken more than passing curiosity.
vierge.work: An excellent day to finalize a document, sort your inbox, or clarify a process. A forgotten administrative question can be settled in a few minutes. Your inner order reflects in your outer order.
vierge.energy: Cerebral energy flows but tightens slightly in the shoulders. Eat slowly and step away from screens before sleep, your rest will thank you.
vierge.intuition: Your body sends you a precise signal today: a tightness, a tingle, a craving. Do not brush it off too quickly, observe it with kind curiosity.
vierge.mantra: I sort gently and I keep what truly matters.

balance.author: Sibylle
balance.intro: Libra, on this Venusian Friday, elegance and finesse are your natural allies. The first of May invites you to celebrate the beauty of the threshold, that suspended moment when everything still feels possible. Choose with grace rather than out of conflict avoidance.
balance.love: You can clarify an expectation that has stayed blurry for a few weeks. Truth spoken with tact draws closer than it pushes away. If you are single, an encounter in a cultural or aesthetic setting could leave a lasting mark through its rightness.
balance.work: A negotiation turns in your favor if you dare to offer the first proposal. Your sense of compromise becomes a real asset, not a trap. You can hold a firm boundary with a smile, and that combination is precious.
balance.energy: Elegant energy scatters easily. A brief artistic activity, a sketch, a melody, refocuses your attention within minutes.
balance.intuition: Your felt sense of someone today is more precise than your rational arguments. Trust your first impression without diluting it in justifications.
balance.mantra: I choose with grace and clarity.

scorpion.author: Sibylle
scorpion.intro: Scorpio, a quiet intensity inhabits you, like deep water beneath a smooth surface. You perceive what others barely sense, and that is a strength when you measure it with discernment. The day's secret: do not reveal everything at once.
scorpion.love: Desire and tenderness mingle closely. If you are partnered, a long shared gaze says more than a long speech. If you are single, watch for past ties that resurface, choose to revisit without repeating the same script.
scorpion.work: You spot a decisive detail no one else has seen. Document it and present it with sobriety, without dramatizing the finding. Your natural authority lands better through concision than through insistence.
scorpion.energy: Magnetic, deep, slightly secretive energy. Avoid caffeine after three in the afternoon, your sleep will benefit clearly and your dreams will speak more.
scorpion.intuition: A truth you refused to look at suddenly becomes obvious. Welcome it without drama, it is a release far more than a loss.
scorpion.mantra: I lucidly transform what limits me.

sagittaire.author: Sibylle
sagittaire.intro: Sagittarius, the horizon calls you even if you stay close to home on this first of May. A book, a podcast, a conversation can widen your inner world as much as a distant journey. To travel, today, can also mean changing perspective for a single day.
sagittaire.love: Enthusiasm and humor are your allies. If you are partnered, propose a simple nearby adventure, a new neighborhood, a new flavor shared together. If you are single, an encounter with someone from elsewhere shakes you up joyfully.
sagittaire.work: A larger vision benefits from being shared in accessible terms. A project carried alone for a long time will find support if you can present it simply. You can convince through honest enthusiasm, without grandiloquence.
sagittaire.energy: Energy runs high and optimistic, sometimes a little reckless in its surge. Move outdoors if possible, your body will genuinely thank you by evening.
sagittaire.intuition: A coincidence today points toward a future travel or learning project. Note it down, it will return to find you in a few weeks.
sagittaire.mantra: I open my horizon with sincere joy.

capricorne.author: Sibylle
capricorne.intro: Capricorn, your solidity is your treasure, and the sky invites you today to add a touch of tenderness to it. The summit is not only a matter of effort, it is also the choice of a path that resembles you. Breathe before planning the next step.
capricorne.love: You can voice an attachment you usually keep to yourself. The sobriety of your words will weigh more than long speeches. If you are single, a mature and steady person catches your attention through reliability rather than flash.
capricorne.work: An excellent day to structure a plan or clarify financial goals. Refuse vague requests and ask for a clear frame before committing. Your time deserves to be protected like a precious resource.
capricorne.energy: Energy is tenacious but stiff. Stretch your neck and shoulders mid-day, you carry tensions without always noticing them.
capricorne.intuition: Your instinct says a procedure can wait a few more days. Listen without guilt, the context will clarify on its own soon.
capricorne.mantra: I build with patience and tenderness.

verseau.author: Sibylle
verseau.intro: Aquarius, your visionary mind catches the faint signals of a future taking shape in the background. You feel both present and already elsewhere, and that is a singular creative strength. Honor your ideas by writing them down, even briefly, on whatever support is at hand.
verseau.love: Friendship and love overlap today in an intriguing way. A friend could surprise you with a discreet declaration. If you are partnered, share a small common utopia to revive the meaning of your bond.
verseau.work: An innovation, even a minor one, shifts the dynamic in your team. Do not wait for perfection to propose it. A shared draft will inspire valuable, sometimes better contributions than your initial idea.
verseau.energy: Electric energy, sometimes out of sync with your body. Drink plenty of water and walk outside to fully inhabit yourself.
verseau.intuition: A collective intuition crosses through you today. You sense what your group feels before it speaks. Serve as a relay, not as the official spokesperson.
verseau.mantra: I invent the future alongside my friends.

poissons.author: Sibylle
poissons.intro: Pisces, you swim today in waters that are both gentle and deep on this first of May. Your sensitivity is a powerful radar, as long as you do not confuse it with others' feelings. Set an inner boundary first thing in the morning, in silence.
poissons.love: Romance takes on a more mature flavor today. You seek a connection that goes beyond the surface. If you are partnered, a shared artistic moment strengthens the bond. If you are single, a meeting in a spiritual context could touch you deeply.
poissons.work: Your imagination is fertile, but it needs grounding. Pick one project and take one concrete step today. A mentor or inspiring figure can be reached without hesitation, the timing is right.
poissons.energy: Shifting energy scatters slightly. A guided meditation or a swim will rebalance your emotions faster than you expect.
poissons.intuition: Your nightly dreams carry a recurring symbolic message. Note it for three nights and a clear thread will emerge little by little.
poissons.mantra: I feel, I create, I protect myself.
